intent: An AI-driven project management platform that utilizes predictive analytics to forecast bottleneck risks before they occur, automatically re-balancing resource allocation across teams, and automating administrative status reporting to maximize developer output.

entities.name: WorkStreamEvent
entities.description: An immutable record capturing granular VCS activities such as commit volume, pull request velocity, and code review latency.

entities.name: PredictiveRiskModel
entities.description: A machine learning artifact that ingests historical velocity data to calculate probability scores for task-level bottlenecks.

entities.name: ResourceAllocationManifest
entities.description: A dynamic state object defining optimal task-to-engineer assignments to balance workload across cross-functional Scrum teams.

entities.name: SprintVelocitySnapshot
entities.description: A time-series metric aggregation representing the actual vs. expected delivery capacity during active sprint cycles.

entities.name: NotificationDispatchQueue
entities.description: A highly available event bus that routes automated status reports and bottleneck alerts to configured external communication channels like Slack or Teams.

entities.name: IdentityOrganizationContext
entities.description: A centralized authorization schema managing hierarchical access control for multi-tenant enterprise organizational structures.

architecture.description: The architecture utilizes an event-driven microservices pattern where WorkStreamEvent entities are ingested via webhooks from Git providers into an asynchronous Kafka stream. The predictive engine periodically consumes these events to update the PredictiveRiskModel. When risk thresholds are crossed, the system triggers the ResourceAllocationManifest service, which runs a constraint-based solver to suggest re-balancing actions. These updates are committed to the sprint state, simultaneously triggering the NotificationDispatchQueue to inform stakeholders. All persistent state is managed in a distributed NoSQL database, ensuring sub-millisecond lookups for real-time dashboards while enforcing fine-grained security via the IdentityOrganizationContext.

validation_rules: auth_configuration must be a valid JSON object

endpoints.summary: List VCS work stream events for an organization
validation_rules: org_id must be a valid integer

endpoints.summary: Get the most recent risk probability scores
validation_rules: org_id must be a valid integer
org_id must be a valid integer
org_id must be a valid integer

endpoints.summary: Queue an automated alert or status report
validation_rules: org_id must be a valid integer

rules.logic: The system shall reject update or delete operations on existing WorkStreamEvent records stored in the database.

rules.description: Trigger resource re-balancing on high risk score
rules.logic: If PredictiveRiskModel risk_score_matrix exceeds 0.85, the system must initiate a new version of the ResourceAllocationManifest for the associated org_id.

rules.description: Validate organizational access for resource allocation
rules.logic: Verify IdentityOrganizationContext auth_configuration for the user role before permitting mutations to ResourceAllocationManifest.

rules.description: Recalculate sprint metrics upon manifest updates
rules.logic: When ResourceAllocationManifest version updates, trigger an analysis to update the SprintVelocitySnapshot metrics_data.
Upon successful update to ResourceAllocationManifest, create a new NotificationDispatchQueue entry for organizational stakeholders.
